original: This thermos-like container is filled to the brim with the sweet nectar milked from the breasts of a gold myr female. The sweet smell reaches out even through the plastic. A cursory examination says that the nectar shouldn’t be mutagenic.
context: <<POS:06563306>> of gold myr nectar",e.tooltip='This thermos-like container is filled to the brim with the s'

original: You flip up the top of the thermos and bring the container up to your mouth. The substance inside is almost painfully sweet, burning your nose until your [pc.lips] wrap around the tip and you start sucking the contents down. When you’ve finished the thermos off, you suck in a sharp breath as the sweet nectar drools down your throat like syrup.
